notes: Flutter checkout present but cloud-only; no offline path, no local store, no sync code.
P0 criteria (data-loss on sync, on-device language correctness) NOT testable on this checkout.
Static analysis only; Flutter not invoked; firebase_options.dart absent.

findings.title: Hybrid inference flag permanently off; offline path inert
findings.evidence: static const bool _hybridInferenceAvailable = false; _buildModel always returns cloud-only constructor.
findings.user_impact: When device offline, every call throws network error to UI; no fallback.
findings.fix_summary: Flip constant when firebase_ai exposes useHybridInference; add connectivity check + offline UX in interim.

findings.title: No local store, no outbox, no sync — entire offline write path absent
findings.evidence: Zero local persistence deps (sqflite/drift/hive/isar/sembast/shared_preferences). No repository/DAO/outbox classes in lib/.
findings.user_impact: Nothing queued offline; offline writes simply fail. Reconciliation logic is not present to verify.
findings.fix_summary: Pick a store (drift recommended for SQL + codegen, isar for object store), add outbox per collection, define conflict policy (LWW vs vector clock) BEFORE merge code.

findings.title: Voice clips written to getTemporaryDirectory; failure drops bytes with no retry queue
findings.evidence: Recorder writes to tmp dir; on transcription error, bytes are not persisted; no resumable upload.
findings.user_impact: Rural teacher on flaky network records voice → upload fails → clip lost. Voice-first app guarantee broken.
findings.fix_summary: Use application-documents dir + SQLite row {path, mime, createdAt, status}; retry with exp backoff on connectivity restore.

findings.title: iOS min 13.0; Android minSdk unpinned — will silently disable Nano for ~95% of users when hybrid lands
findings.user_impact: Once hybrid flag flips, existing user base will mostly fall back to cloud silently. Cost + UX expectation mismatch.
findings.fix_summary: Add runtime AICore / Apple Intelligence capability check; UI badge for on-device availability; pin minSdk=24 explicitly.

findings.title: VIDYA classifier JSON parsed without schema/enum validation — P0 risk once Nano live
findings.evidence: responseMimeType=application/json set but no responseSchema; jsonDecode then ['intent'] with no enum check.
findings.user_impact: When on-device Nano lands, hallucinated/markdown-wrapped intent labels will break VIDYA routing. High risk on bn/ta/kn/ml/gu/pa/te/or/as.
findings.fix_summary: Add responseSchema with enum of 11 intents; hard allow-list check; route 'unknown' back to cloud.

findings.title: firebase_options.dart absent — app cannot boot on fresh checkout
findings.evidence: Firebase.initializeApp() called without options; flutterfire configure not yet run; no google-services.json / GoogleService-Info.plist.
findings.user_impact: Dev cannot run app to repro; this agent could not run dynamic checks.
findings.fix_summary: Commit firebase_options.dart for dev project, or document flutterfire configure as required bootstrap step.

not_evaluable.reason: no offline write path exists in checkout
on-device inference dormant; needs Phase T.2 100-prompt eval on emulator
no sync layer exists in checkout
no offline mode implemented; today it simply surfaces network error in UI

recommendation: Out-of-scope as a P0 hunt on this checkout. Re-hunt when Phase T.2 ships, with emphasis on F20-002 (sync correctness) and F20-005 (on-device language correctness) — both upgrade to P0 once the offline path goes live.
